chaos.heading: Chaos won't win twice.
chaos.subheading: We're not here to create just another parenting app.
chaos.card1: We don't manage children: we empower them.
chaos.card1Body1: Nagging isn't solved with more rules. It's removed by making responsibility meaningful.
chaos.card1Body2: Falak converts good intentions into quests, values into habits, and effort into rewards. Without you having to enforce it twice.
chaos.card2Example: Ali hasn't started his homework quest — it's due before Maghrib.
chaos.card2Body1: We don't compete with other apps. We compete with the habits that never stick. With the values that get lost in the noise. With the parenting moments that slip away.
chaos.card2Body2: We don't sell features. We sell growth. And growth is everything.
chaos.card3: We're not just an app. We're a shift in parenting.
chaos.card3Body: We don't design for you to stare at it. We design it to work while you live. Falak doesn't seek your attention — it guides your child's growth quietly, and celebrates when it counts.
chaos.card4: What we are building doesn't exist yet.
chaos.card4Body1: We don't add features. We're building a family operating system.
chaos.card4Body2: A new approach to tarbiyah. A new rhythm for the home. A new way of raising children. With intention, clarity, and joy.
chaos.appBody: The world doesn't need more parenting apps. It needs fewer things weighing on your mind. Falak integrates into the rhythms of your family. Centralize what matters. Build what lasts. Raise with clarity.

features.card0User: Remind Ali to clean his room before Maghrib.
features.card0Bot: ✨ Room Rescue Quest created for Ali. Reward: 20 Stars upon completion.
features.card1User: I want Yusuf to practice Quran reading every day.
features.card1Bot: 📿 Daily Recitation Quest added. 3-day streak unlocked — Yusuf is on a roll!
features.card2User: Why isn't Ali completing his homework quests?
features.card2Bot: ⭐ Ali completes outdoor quests 2× more often. Suggestion: add sports rewards to boost engagement.
features.card3User: Nour tried to help with dinner but didn't finish.
features.card3Bot: 🌙 Effort bonus awarded — +15 Stars for 'Help prepare dinner'. Trying counts!
features.card4User: What rewards can Rami save up for?
features.card4Bot: 🎮 30 min gaming · 🍦 Ice cream outing · 📚 New book — Rami has 85 stars and counting.
features.card5User: How is Sara doing with her habits this week?
features.card5Bot: 📊 Sara's Week: Quran – 5/7, Room – 6/7, Homework – 7/7. Best streak: 3 days!
features.card6Title: Set screen time as a reward
features.card6User: Lina gets 30 minutes of YouTube only after finishing homework.
features.card6Bot: 📱 Screen Time Gate created. YouTube unlocks automatically once homework is marked done.
features.card7User: Let me know when Zaid reaches 100 stars.
features.card7Bot: 🎉 Milestone set at 100 stars. You'll get a notification the moment Zaid earns it.
features.card8User: Give both kids weekend chores and see who finishes first.
features.card8Bot: 🏠 Weekend Challenge created for both. First to complete all quests earns a bonus reward.

seo.title: Memorae | Your personal memory assistant
seo.description: Memorae helps you remember, organize, and act. Unlimited reminders, smart lists, and AI-powered memory across WhatsApp, Telegram, email, and the Memorae App.

testimonies.heading: they are raising better kids with Falak

testimonials.t0Quote: Without a doubt, it's the best tool I've subscribed to this year. Keep up the good work!
testimonials.t1Quote: As a parent of three, keeping everyone on track felt impossible. Falak turned our chaos into a system the whole family actually enjoys. 🌟
testimonials.t2Quote: Thanks to Falak! It's something that has changed my family's life. Yesterday I discovered the family reminders feature and it was like: wooooooooooooooooooow!
testimonials.t3Quote: A marvel. Now my family has a guide, and it's called Falak.
testimonials.t4Title: The best invention of the century
testimonials.t4Quote: My kids actually ask to do their quests now. I never thought I'd say that. Falak made responsibility something they want, not something they dread.
testimonials.t5Title: The best thing that ever happened to me
testimonials.t5Quote: The best investment I've made for my family. My son went from skipping chores daily to earning his stars with pride. It's been incredible to watch.
testimonials.t6Quote: The Tarbiyah insights dashboard gave me a window into my children's growth I never had before. Now parenting feels intentional, not reactive. I love it! 😄
testimonials.t7Quote: Falak has been a game-changer for our family! It helps my kids stay on top of their responsibilities and builds great habits. Now my mind is free to focus on what really matters, because Falak handles the rest. I've even noticed I'm much less stressed!
testimonials.t8Quote: At first I was a little hesitant, and in fact my first real test was asking Falak to remind me to cancel my subscription the day before the trial period ended. Obviously, that was the most useless reminder ever. This is brilliant!
testimonials.t9Quote: I was skeptical at first but the weekly growth summaries proved me wrong. Seeing my daughter's progress laid out clearly made me realize how much Falak was helping our family.
testimonials.t10Title: How could I live without it?
testimonials.t10Quote: Gosh, this tool has been incredible. It's been such a lifesaver in a short space of time.
testimonials.t11Quote: Life changer. It just makes my family's life so much easier. Forever grateful to the creators. I even call it 'Falak' now, that's how close we are. And with everything new that's coming... it's simply phenomenal 🤩

pricing.guaranteeDesc: Try it for free. Then you have a full 14 days to request a complete refund. No questions, no forms, just your money back.

faq.q0: What is Falak and how can it help my family?
faq.a0: Falak is your family's quest and responsibility companion. It helps children build good habits through quests, star rewards, and streak tracking — while giving parents full visibility and control. Just set up a quest and Falak takes care of the rest.
faq.q1: What types of features does Falak offer?
faq.a1: Falak offers quest-based responsibility systems, star rewards, streak tracking, a Family Hub for multi-child support, weekly growth summaries, Tarbiyah insights, smart quest suggestions, and much more depending on your plan.
faq.q2: Can I set recurring quests for my children?
faq.a2: Yes! You can set quests that repeat daily, weekly, or on custom schedules. Falak will keep tracking progress until the quest is completed.
faq.q3: Does Falak spy on my family or is our data safe?
faq.a3: Your privacy is our top priority. Falak does not read, analyze, or sell your personal data. All communications are encrypted, and you remain in full control of your family's information at all times.
faq.q4: How does Falak protect my privacy and data security?
faq.a4: We use end-to-end encryption for all data, store it on secure servers, and follow strict data protection regulations. Your family's data is never shared with third parties.
faq.q5: What advantages does Falak offer compared to other parenting tools?
faq.a5: Falak combines Islamic values with modern gamification, making responsibility-building fun and meaningful for children. It gives parents real insights through the Tarbiyah dashboard and works seamlessly across the whole family.
faq.a6: Yes, Falak is available around the clock, 365 days a year. Your family's companion never sleeps, so you can rely on it anytime.
faq.q7: How many children can I add to my family account?
faq.a7: All plans include multi-child support through the Family Hub, so every member of your family can have their own quests and progress tracking.
faq.q8: Are there limits to the number of quests I can set up?
faq.a8: With any paid plan, you get unlimited quests and reminders. There are no caps on how many quests, rewards, or family members you can add.
